vocab.cascade: Use Cascade for multi-file changes. Describe the full feature — Cascade plans and executes across files.
vocab.context: Windsurf indexes your entire codebase. Reference patterns: 'implement this similarly to how X is done in Y file'.
vocab.inline: Ctrl+I for inline edits on selected code. Best for targeted changes to existing functions.
vocab.debugging: Share the exact error message and stack trace. Describe expected vs actual behavior. Windsurf reads your terminal output.
vocab.scope: Specify boundaries clearly: 'only change the auth module, do not modify the database schema'.
